1. Islam Basics.Name: inportant info sheet to move to wedebdday

2. Huzoor sal allahu aleihi wa.Name: 1. O Muslims!) Indeed, in the Messenger of Allah you have an excellent example (33:21)
2. Say: If you love Allah, then follow me, Allah will love you. (3:31)

3. Almighty has always sent prophets and messengers for every

nation to tell His people about the oneness of Allah Almighty and His commands,

but you were not sent for any one nation but for the entire world of jinn and humans, and the Shariah you brought will last until the Day of Judgment.
6. Uncle : Abu Talib ( who helped PBUH)
